creator: nistor@snickers.org
text:
New Port:
	CDB_File is a module which provides a Perl interface to Dan Berstein's
	cdb package:

    cdb is a fast, reliable, lightweight package for creating and
	reading constant databases.

	See http://pobox.com/~djb/cdb.html for the latest information
	about cdb.

Fix: 

New Port: <new port>
How-To-Repeat: 
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/
#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile
#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/t
#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-comment
#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-descr
#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-plist
#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/distinfo
#
echo c - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/
mkdir -p /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile'
X# ports collection makefile for:	perl interface to CDB.
X# Date created:				24 June 2001
X# Whom:						Jon Nistor <nistor@snickers.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=CDB_File
XPORTVERSION=0.86
XCATEGORIES=databases perl5
XMASTER_SITES=$(MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN)
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=CDB_File/TIMPX
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=nistor@snickers.org
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
XALL_TARGET=	all test
X
Xpost-patch:
X	${PERL} -pi -e 's|^(INCLUDE\s+= )./libraries/.*$$|$$1\$(PREFIX)/include/db3|g; \
X		s|^(LIB\s+= )./libraries/.*$$|$$1$(PREFIX)/lib|g' ${WRKSRC}/config.in
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile
echo x - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/t
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/t << 'END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/t'
X# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
X# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
X# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
X# have default permissions.
X#
X# This archive contains:
X#
X#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/
X#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile
X#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/t
X#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-comment
X#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-descr
X#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-plist
X#	/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/distinfo
X#
Xecho c - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/
Xmkdir -p /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/ > /dev/null 2>&1
Xecho x - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile
Xsed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile'
XX# ports collection makefile for:	perl interface to CDB.
XX# Date created:				24 June 2001
XX# Whom:						Jon Nistor <nistor@snickers.org>
XX#
XX# $FreeBSD$
XX#
XX
XXPORTNAME=CDB_File
XXPORTVERSION=0.86
XXCATEGORIES=databases perl5
XXMASTER_SITES=$(MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN)
XXMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=CDB_File/TIMPX
XXPKGNAMEPREFIX=p5-
XX
XXMAINTAINER=nistor@snickers.org
XX
XXPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
XXALL_TARGET=	all test
XX
XXpost-patch:
XX	${PERL} -pi -e 's|^(INCLUDE\s+= )./libraries/.*$$|$$1\$(PREFIX)/include/db3|g; \
XX		s|^(LIB\s+= )./libraries/.*$$|$$1$(PREFIX)/lib|g' ${WRKSRC}/config.in
XX
XX.include <bsd.port.mk>
XEND-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/Makefile
Xecho x - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/t
Xsed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/t << 'END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/t'
END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/t
echo x - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-comment << 'END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-comment'
XPerl5 interface to the CDB package
END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-comment
echo x - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-descr << 'END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-descr'
XThis is the perl5 interface to CDB.
XVery useful for people who would like to export information from an SQL type
Xdatabase directly into a CDB file via $cdb->insert in a perl script.
X
Xenjoy,
X
XJon Nistor
Xnistor@snickers.org
END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-descr
echo x - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-plist << 'END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-plist'
Xlib/perl5/%%PERL_VER%%/man/man3/CDB_File.3
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/CDB_File.pm
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CDB_File/CDB_File.so
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CDB_File/CDB_File.bs
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CDB_File/.packlist
X@dirrm lib/perl5/site_perl/%%PERL_VER%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CDB_File
END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/pkg-plist
echo x - /usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/distinfo << 'END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/distinfo'
XMD5 (CDB_File-0.86.tar.gz) = 590fe1742b2086113b5d845646b6654b
END-of-/usr/ports/databases/p5-CDB_File/distinfo
exit
